垃圾场遗弃之地9527管理员。
　　一座残废的诸天城，连接诸天万界。
　　招募诸天万界生灵打工，随便点评诸天万界，最惨打工人孟婆，神话三大反骨仔，独断万古荒天帝，诸天十大逼王，诸天十大科技文明，诸天至高神话世界！
　　历史位面，从小兕子开始的历史人物汇聚。
　　军事位面，抗战的李云龙，周卫国，现代的冷锋……
　　动漫位面，呆毛王，呆头鹅，智障女神，小蜘蛛，荒天帝，叶天帝，狠人，李星云，焰灵姬……
　　魔幻位面，精灵女皇，光明神，战争女神雅典娜……
　　神话位面：孙悟空，杨戬，哪吒三大反骨仔齐聚，玉皇大帝，如来佛祖，三清，女娲……甚至，盘古大神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c58c2228652bbbb9a30b4916e8d71cc2","author":"一荤一素的人生","author_id":"","book_id":"7492255814535613464","book_name":"我有一界，诸天万界的界！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7613人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":383,"name":"九叔","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=383&name=九叔&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7492255919091221016","read_count":"7613","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"910154"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"448","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,诸天万界,九叔,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5d421fed69050e86915b45088db3291f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779467681&x-signature=B7kVlNwBixsaUZqAFYCI8W8tPj8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2515285318054775","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324003440C42D6A6F8F27B6CE3EDD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count
